sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93150" key="salka=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαλκᾶ</orth> (gen. sg.), <sense id="n93150.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a fragrant oil</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.135</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
